identity_baseline: A massive, white, hairless humanoid non-human with ape-like characteristics.
stable_visual_summary: The colossal creature is a massive, bipedal humanoid non-human with an ape-like morphology. Its skin is entirely white and hairless, with the sole exception of a single, distinct shock of bristly hair. It possesses a large-scale physical presence.
distinguishing_features: A distinct shock of bristly hair
continuity_constraints: Maintain white, hairless skin texture across all shots.
The shock of bristly hair must remain a consistent, singular identifier.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific location or nature of the "shock of hair" on the body.
Exact facial features or limb proportions beyond "ape-like."
evidence_summary: [source:C:/FilmCreator_MC/projects/princess_of_mars_test/02_story_analysis/character_breakdowns/chapters/CH005/the_colossal_creature.md] Physical Description: A massive, ape-like being. It is white and hairless, except for a distinct shock of bristly hair.
